title: Remedies cumulative
doc_html:
Art. 1301.4. Remedies cumulative

            A. Remedies provided by this Chapter are cumulative and do not affect the availability of remedies under other law or the recognition of a foreign support order on the basis of comity.

            B. This Chapter does not:

            (1) Provide the exclusive method of establishing or enforcing a support order under the law of this state; or

            (2) Grant a tribunal of this state jurisdiction to render judgment or issue an order relating to child custody or visitation in a proceeding under this Chapter.

            Acts 1995, No. 251, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1996; Acts 1997, No. 1241, §1, eff. July 15, 1997; Acts 2010, No. 877, §3, eff. July 1, 2010; Acts 2015, No. 80, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.

Art. 1301.4.  Remedies cumulative
A.  Remedies provided by this Chapter are cumulative and do not affect the
availability of remedies under other law or the recognition of a foreign support order on the
basis of comity.
B.  This Chapter does not:
(1)  Provide the exclusive method of establishing or enforcing a support order under
the law of this state; or
(2)  Grant a tribunal of this state jurisdiction to render judgment or issue an order
relating to child custody or visitation in a proceeding under this Chapter.
Acts 1995, No. 251, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1996; Acts 1997, No. 1241, §1, eff. July 15, 1997;
Acts 2010, No. 877, §3, eff. July 1, 2010; Acts 2015, No. 80, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
